category_sources: source_facts.description says DICOM WSI read library; official GitHub README describes libdicom as a C library and command-line tools for reading DICOM WSI files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libdicom; official ReadTheDocs title and GitHub README use libdicom.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository links to libdicom.readthedocs.io and the site contains Introduction, Installation, Usage, API documentation, and command-line tools sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ImagingDataCommons/libdicom, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables dcm-dump/dcm-getframe; official README describes DICOM WSI reading, C API, and command-line tools.
